creator: Ivan Mehta
title: (No AI) Canva’s AI assistant can now call various tools to make designs for you

title: (No AI) Canva’s AI 2.0 update goes all in on prompt-powered design tools
author: Jess Weatherbed
content:
![An illustration showing Canva’s AI 2.0 update for prompt-based editing.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/04/Canva-AI-2.0.png?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Canva has overhauled its design and workspace suite as it attempts to become the ultimate centralized hub for AI-powered content creation. The platform announced its Canva AI 2.0 update today, introducing updated tools and new prompt-based editing capabilities that allow users to make or adjust their work by describing what they want to create to Canva's AI assistant in their own words.

The update includes a new orchestration layer for Canva's AI models that lets creatives and marketers access the platform's entire suite of tools from a single, unified conversational interface. That means users can ask the chatbot to perform actions like "c …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/tech/913068/canva-ai-2-update-prompt-based-editing-availability)

Canva has overhauled its design and workspace suite as it attempts to become the ultimate centralized hub for AI-powered content creation. The update includes a new orchestration layer for Canva's AI models that lets creatives and marketers access the platform's entire suite of tools from a single, unified conversational interface. That means users can ask the chatbot to perform actions like "c …

title: (No AI) Trump’s posting even more AI-generated Trump-Jesus fan art
author: Tina Nguyen
content:
![](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/04/trump-jesus-altered.png?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

The version posted by @realdonaldtrump/Truth Social.

_Hello and welcome to_ Regulator_, a newsletter for_ Verge _subscribers about Big Tech power plays in Washington and beyond. (And when I say beyond, I mean the great beyond, like Heaven, maybe.) If you've found your way to this newsletter from the wild,_ [_annual subscriptions are currently 50 percent off_](https://www.theverge.com/subscribe)_. That's $30 a year for access to an entire newsroom full of reporting about technology and how it's eating society alive - not just in politics!_  
_(I will also accept confidential tips at_ [**_tina.nguyen+tips@theverge.com_**](mailto:tina.nguyen+tips@theverge.com)_.)_

title: (No AI) Accelerating the cyber defense ecosystem that protects us all
content: Leading security firms and enterprises join OpenAI’s Trusted Access for Cyber, using GPT-5.4-Cyber and $10M in API grants to strengthen global cyber defense.
contentSnippet: Leading security firms and enterprises join OpenAI’s Trusted Access for Cyber, using GPT-5.4-Cyber and $10M in API grants to strengthen global cyber defense.

title: (No AI) The next evolution of the Agents SDK
content: OpenAI updates the Agents SDK with native sandbox execution and a model-native harness, helping developers build secure, long-running agents across files and tools.
contentSnippet: OpenAI updates the Agents SDK with native sandbox execution and a model-native harness, helping developers build secure, long-running agents across files and tools.

title: (No AI) Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech
content: Our newest audio model introduces granular audio tags that give you precise control to direct AI speech for expressive audio generation.
contentSnippet: Our newest audio model introduces granular audio tags that give you precise control to direct AI speech for expressive audio generation.

creator: Will Knight
title: (No AI) AI Could Democratize One of Tech's Most Valuable Resources
